NNU Aerospace Club
2022 - MARSHA 2023 - DAEDALUS 2024 - DAEDALUS II 2025 - DAEDALUS IV About Home

DAEDALUS IV

DAEDALUS IV continued the work of DAEDALUS II, designing a new non-electromagnetic ball launcher

Summary

The project focused on:

  • Robotic Arms in Space
  • End-Mounted Depth Cameras
  • Mechanical Ball Launcher

Results

Upon re-entry, our plate, which was on the bottom of the stack, snapped off. No data was recovered

Final Report

You can download the complete report here: 2025 Report
